_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning how to use vocabulary more precisely, including specialist and technical words that give our communication greater accuracy and depth.

_source.w: We are learning how to use vocabulary more precisely, including specialist and technical words that give our communication greater accuracy and depth.
y: Precise vocabulary allows us to express exactly what we mean, without ambiguity.
Specialist vocabulary shows we understand a topic deeply enough to use its language correctly.
A more precise vocabulary makes both our speaking and writing more powerful and credible.
eg: We replace vague words with more precise ones — 'walked' becomes 'strode', 'shuffled' or 'tiptoed'.
We use specialist vocabulary in our subject-area writing — like 'habitat', 'equation' or 'perspective'.
We discuss how choosing the right word can change the meaning of a sentence entirely.
We keep a vocabulary notebook organised by subject and topic.
We analyse how an author uses precise language to create strong images or convey expertise.
We practise using technical terms correctly in both speaking and writing.
